name: G Suite for GMail
description: Integrates with G Suite for various investigative and containment actions

key_json.description: Contents of Service Account JSON file

first_run_max_emails.description: Maximum emails for scheduled polling first time

forwarding_address.description: Address to forward polled emails to

auto_reply.description: Auto reply to emails with a set body

default_format.description: Format used for the get email action

actions.description: Poll for new emails from Gmail and yield Container objects.
actions.verbose: Callback action for the on_poll ingest functionality

start_time.name: start_time
start_time.description: Start of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds).

end_time.name: end_time
end_time.description: End of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds).

container_count.name: container_count
container_count.description: Maximum number of container records to query for.

artifact_count.name: artifact_count
artifact_count.description: Maximum number of artifact records to query for.

container_id.name: container_id
container_id.description: Comma-separated list of container IDs to limit the ingestion to.

actions.description: Poll for new emails and yield Finding objects for ES ingestion.
actions.verbose: Callback action for the on_es_poll ingest functionality

start_time.name: start_time
start_time.description: Start of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds).

end_time.name: end_time
end_time.description: End of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds).

container_count.name: container_count
container_count.description: Maximum number of findings to query for.

actions.description:
Test connectivity to Google Workspace.

Verifies that the service account credentials are valid and can access
the configured domain.

Retrieve user profile information.

Uses the Gmail API to get user profile metadata including message and
thread counts.

Args:
    params: Action parameters containing email address
    soar: SOAR client instance
    asset: Asset configuration object

Returns:
    User profile information

Raises:
    ActionFailure: If user retrieval fails

List users in the Google Workspace domain.

Uses the Admin SDK to retrieve users with pagination support.

Args:
    params: Action parameters with optional max_items and page_token
    soar: SOAR client instance
    asset: Asset configuration object

Returns:
    List of user profiles

Raises:
    ActionFailure: If user listing fails

max_items.name: max_items
max_items.description: Maximum number of users to retrieve (default 500, max 500)

page_token.name: page_token
page_token.description: Token to retrieve the next page of results

actions.description:
Search emails in a user's mailbox.

Constructs a Gmail query from provided filters and returns matching emails
with pagination support.

Args:
    params: Action parameters for search filters
    soar: SOAR client instance
    asset: Asset configuration object

Returns:
    List of matching email messages

Raises:
    ActionFailure: If search fails

subject.name: subject
subject.description: Substring to search in email subject

body.name: body
body.description: Substring to search in email body

internet_message_id.name: internet_message_id
internet_message_id.description: Internet Message ID to search for

query.name: query
query.description: Gmail query string (overrides other filters if provided)

max_results.name: max_results
max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

page_token.name: page_token
page_token.description: Token for pagination to get next page of results

actions.description:
Delete emails from a user's mailbox (idempotent).

Deletes one or more emails by their message IDs. If a message ID doesn't exist
(likely already deleted), it's treated as successful and added to ignored_ids.

Args:
    params: Action parameters with email and message IDs
    soar: SOAR client instance
    asset: Asset configuration object

Returns:
    Summary of deleted and ignored/already-deleted email IDs

Raises:
    ActionFailure: If no valid email IDs are provided, or if any deletion
        fails for a reason other than the message already being deleted (404)

Retrieve and parse email details.

Fetches email from Gmail API, parses MIME structure, extracts IOCs and
optionally downloads attachments and raw email to vault.

Args:
    params: Action parameters
    soar: SOAR client instance
    asset: Asset configuration object

Returns:
    Parsed email with extracted data

Raises:
    ActionFailure: If email retrieval fails

download_email.name: download_email
download_email.description: Download raw email as EML file to vault

actions.description:
Send email via Gmail.

Constructs MIME message with attachments, respecting 25MB size limit.
Optionally creates send-as alias before sending.

Args:
    params: Action parameters
    soar: SOAR client instance
    asset: Asset configuration object

Returns:
    Send result with message ID and thread ID

Raises:
    ActionFailure: If email send fails

Move emails to trash in a user's mailbox (idempotent).

Moves one or more emails to the Trash label by their message IDs. If a
message ID doesn't exist, it is treated as successful and added to ignored_ids.

Args:
    params: Action parameters with email and message IDs
    soar: SOAR client instance
    asset: Asset configuration object

Returns:
    Summary of trashed and ignored/already-trashed email IDs

Raises:
    ActionFailure: If no valid email IDs are provided, or if any trash
        operation fails for a reason other than the message not existing (404)

Restore emails from trash in a user's mailbox (idempotent).

Removes one or more emails from the Trash label by their message IDs. If a
message ID doesn't exist, it is treated as successful and added to ignored_ids.

Args:
    params: Action parameters with email and message IDs
    soar: SOAR client instance
    asset: Asset configuration object

Returns:
    Summary of untrashed and ignored email IDs

Raises:
    ActionFailure: If no valid email IDs are provided, or if any untrash
        operation fails for a reason other than the message not existing (404)

Add labels to emails in a user's mailbox using Gmail batchModify.

Applies one or more label IDs to one or more messages.

Args:
    params: Action parameters with email, message IDs, and label IDs
    soar: SOAR client instance
    asset: Asset configuration object

Returns:
    Summary of labeled email IDs

Raises:
    ActionFailure: If no valid email IDs or label IDs are provided, if more
        than 1000 message IDs are supplied, or if the batch modify request
        fails

label_ids.name: label_ids
label_ids.description: Label IDs to add (comma-separated, for example: STARRED,IMPORTANT or Label_1234567890)

actions.verbose: 'make request' action for the app. Used to handle arbitrary HTTP requests with the app's asset

http_method.name: http_method
http_method.description: The HTTP method to use for the request.

endpoint.name: endpoint
endpoint.description: Gmail API endpoint to call, appended to the API base URL. Example: '/gmail/v1/users/me/profile'. Note: this action is authorized with the gmail.readonly scope only — write or modify endpoints will require additional domain-wide delegation.

headers.name: headers
headers.description: The headers to send with the request (JSON object). An example is {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}

query_parameters.name: query_parameters
query_parameters.description: Parameters to append to the URL (JSON object or query string). An example is ?key=value&key2=value2

body.name: body
body.description: The body to send with the request (JSON object). An example is {'key': 'value', 'key2': 'value2'}

timeout.name: timeout
timeout.description: The timeout for the request in seconds.

verify_ssl.name: verify_ssl
verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify the SSL certificate.
